entry.title: New: RES24-206 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
APPROVING A GRANT OF EASEMENT TO HAWAIIAN ELECTRIC COMPANY, INC. FOR ELECTRICAL PURPOSES SERVING THE HONOLULU RAIL TRANSIT PROJECT (HRTP) OVER, UNDER, THROUGH, AND ACROSS A PORTION OF REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 1819 DILLINGHAM BOULEVARD, HONOLULU, HAWAII 96819 (TMK: (1) 1-2-003-016).

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
